name: Gravelight Company
specialty: Gravelight Company specializes in retrieving artifacts from the volatile rifts that tear the fabric of reality, a task requiring both bravery and expertise in rift navigation that sets them apart from other adventurers.

members.name: Elara Ironhands
members.note: A veteran rift-runner with a cybernetic left arm, she's known for her unyielding resolve and strategic prowess.

members.name: Vorrik the Swift
members.note: With his keen senses and agility, he's the first to spot threats and the last to leave a job undone.

members.name: Zephyr Duskchaser
members.note: A scholar of the arcane, he wields his spells with precision and discretion, a contrast to his flamboyant personality.

members.name: Thorgrim Bonesmith
members.note: A stout and fearsome fighter, his reputation precedes him as a reliable defender and a formidable adversary.

visual: Dressed in leather armor and cloaks adorned with silver Argent Blades emblems, they carry a variety of weapons and magical trinkets. Their demeanor is serious and focused, but they never shy away from a drink at the local tavern.
reputation_note: Rumored to be the Argent Blades' elite rift-running squad, Gravelight Company's name is whispered with both awe and caution in the Undercity.
